tasks.title: Add CLI-owned change-archive command with structural preflight, transactional moves, and JSON failure output

subtasks.title: Register ai-harness change-archive {change} command adapter that delegates to the Change module
Implement change_archive(root, change) collecting all structural preflight errors before any mutation
Promote changes/{change}/specs to top-level specs and move remaining change folder to top-level archive with rollback
Move remaining changes/{change}/ to .ai-harness/archive/{change} without leaving a specs duplication
Emit exactly done on success and { errors: [...] } JSON on failure with non-zero exit, never ChangeStatus JSON
Cover preflight rejections, all-or-nothing move rollback, stale changes/archive layout avoidance, and output contract in tests
subtasks.scenario: Stale archive layout is not used

tasks.title: Add dedicated change-archiver prompt resource and wire renderer/wizard/installer registrations

subtasks.title: Create src/ai_harness/resources/change-agent/change-archiver.md instructing one CLI run plus one scoped docs commit
Wire change-archiver into the renderer discovery set and spawn allowlist alongside other change agents
Add change-archiver to the wizard/OpenCode change-agent vocabulary in pure.py
Update renderer, install, and set-models fixtures to reflect the new agent count and allowlist
Cover archiver success envelope, blocked envelope, single-commit scoping, and unrelated product dirtiness

tasks.title: Update change-orchestrator prompt for terminal archive routing and archiver failure escalation

subtasks.title: Keep the orchestrator semantic validation gate and remove manual archive file-move instructions
Spawn change-archiver after the semantic gate passes instead of orchestrating moves itself
Treat successful archiver result as terminal and forbid post-archive change-continue
Escalate archiver failure to a blocked human-decision flow instead of continuing
Test the rendered orchestrator archive route for semantic gate, archiver spawn, terminal success, and blocked failure
